description: Reconcile inventory discrepancies. The final document must include calculated differences and financial impacts, with problem items highlighted via conditional formatting.

natural_language.prompt: A retail store completed a physical inventory count. Calculate the difference between expected and actual quantities in column E using the formula =C2-B2. Calculate the financial impact in column F using =E2*D2. Apply conditional formatting to column E: red background for negative values (shortages), yellow background for positive values (overages). Apply conditional formatting to column F to highlight large discrepancies.
